Uses of Interface
org.jgrapht.alg.interfaces.HamiltonianPathSearchResult

Packages that use HamiltonianPathSearchResult
Package
Description
org.jgrapht.alg.interfaces
Algorithm related interfaces.
org.jgrapht.alg.tour
Graph tours and Hamiltonian path related algorithms.

  • Uses of HamiltonianPathSearchResult in org.jgrapht.alg.interfaces

    Methods in org.jgrapht.alg.interfaces that return HamiltonianPathSearchResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <V, E> HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult.aborted(long statesExpanded)
    Creates a result for a search that was stopped by a state limit before completing.
    static <V, E> HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult.found(GraphPath<V,E> path, long statesExpanded)
    Creates a result for a successful search.
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    HamiltonianPathAlgorithm.getPath(Graph<V,E> graph)
    Computes a Hamiltonian path in the given graph and returns a tri-state HamiltonianPathSearchResult.
    static <V, E> HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult.provenAbsent(long statesExpanded)
    Creates a result for an exhaustive search that proved no Hamiltonian path exists.

    Methods in org.jgrapht.alg.tour that return HamiltonianPathSearchResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    BacktrackingHamiltonianPath.getPath(Graph<V,E> graph)
     
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    DagHamiltonianPath.getPath(Graph<V,E> graph)
     
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    HeldKarpHamiltonianPath.getPath(Graph<V,E> graph)
     
    HamiltonianPathSearchResult<V,E>
    BacktrackingHamiltonianPath.searchWithStateLimit(Graph<V,E> graph, long maxStates)
    Performs a Hamiltonian path search with an upper bound on the number of DFS states the solver may explore.
